mapper.update:
update article
set like_count = like_count + 1
set collect_count = collect_count + 1
set like_count = like_count - 1
set collect_count = collect_count - 1
where id = #{articleId}

update article set visibility = '1' where user_id in
#{item}
mapper.select:
select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as updatedTime,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, a.share_count as shareCount, a.is_recommend as isRecommend, a.is_top as isTop, u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, tt.tagsName as tagName, -- 计算热度得分（用于热榜排序） ( a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3 ) / POW( (TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, a.published_at, NOW()) + 2), 1.5 ) as hotScore from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id
-- 关注类型接关注表
left join follow f on f.following_id = a.user_id and f.follower_id = #{request.userId}
where a.visibility = 0 -- 0:公开 and a.status = 1 -- 1:已发布 and a.published_at is not null -- 已发布的文章 and a.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY)
order by hotScore desc, a.published_at desc
and a.is_recommend = 1 order by a.is_top desc, a.published_at desc
and f.id is not null order by a.published_at desc
order by a.published_at desc
limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select count(*) as total from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id
-- 关注类型接关注表
left join follow f on f.following_id = a.user_id and f.follower_id = #{request.userId}
where a.visibility = 0 -- 0:公开 and a.status = 1 -- 1:已发布 and a.published_at is not null -- 已发布的文章
order by (a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3) desc, a.published_at desc
and a.is_recommend = 1
and f.id is not null order by a.published_at desc

SELECT keyword FROM (
(SELECT search_term as keyword, 40 as weight FROM search_hot WHERE search_count > 100 ORDER BY RAND() * search_count DESC LIMIT 8)
UNION ALL
(SELECT name as keyword, 35 as weight FROM article_tag WHERE article_count > 5 ORDER BY RAND() * article_count DESC LIMIT 7)
UNION ALL
(SELECT title as keyword, 25 as weight FROM article WHERE status = '1' AND visibility = '0' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 5) ) temp ORDER BY RAND() * weight DESC LIMIT 20;

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.updated_at as updatedTime,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, u.id as userId,u.avatar,u.nickname as nickName from article a join user u on a.user_id = u.id where (a.title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.summary like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')) and a.status = '1' and a.visibility = '0' order by a.updated_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.updated_at as updatedTime,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, u.id as userId,u.avatar,u.nickname as nickName from article a join user u on a.user_id = u.id join article_tag_relation atr on a.id = atr.article_id join article_tag at on atr.tag_id = at.id where a.status = '1' and a.visibility = '0' and at.name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') order by a.updated_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select u.id as userId,u.nickname,u.avatar,u.signature,u.location, u.topic_count as topicCount,u.comment_count as commentCount, u.follower_count as followCount,u.following_count as followingCount, u.collection_count as collectionCount from user u left join follow f on f.follower_id = #{userId} and f.following_id = u.id where u.nickname like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or u.username like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or u.signature like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as updatedTime,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, a.updated_at as updatedAt,a.published_at as publishedAt, u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, tt.tagsName as tagName, -- 计算热度得分（用于热榜排序） (a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3) as hotScore from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id where a.status = '1' and a.user_id = #{userId} and a.visibility = '0' limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id as articleId,a.title,a.content,a.summary,a.content_html, a.published_at as publishAt,a.is_original as isOriginal, a.like_count as likeCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, a.comment_count as commentCount,a.view_count as viewCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.word_count as wordCount, a.type,a.published_at as publishAt, u.nickname,u.avatar,u.signature,u.location,u.id as authorId from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id where a.id = #{articleId}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as publishedAt,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, -- 计算热度得分（用于热榜排序） (a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3) as hotScore from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join like_record lr on a.id = lr.article_id where a.status = '1' and a.visibility = '0' and lr.user_id = #{userId} and lr.status = '1' limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as updatedTime,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, tt.tagsName as tagName, -- 计算热度得分（用于热榜排序） (a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3) as hotScore from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id where a.user_id = #{userId} and a.visibility = '0' and a.status in('2','3') order by a.updated_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as publishedAt,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, -- 计算热度得分（用于热榜排序） (a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3) as hotScore from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join favorite f on a.id = f.target_id where a.status = '1' and a.visibility = '0' and f.user_id = #{userId} and f.status = '1' limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as updatedTime,a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount,a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount,a.collect_count as collectCount, u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, tt.tagsName as tagName, -- 计算热度得分（用于热榜排序） (a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3) as hotScore from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id where a.status = '1' and a.user_id = #{userId} limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type, a.published_at as updatedTime, a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount, a.comment_count as commentCount, a.share_count as shareCount, a.collect_count as collectCount, a.is_recommend as isRecommend, a.is_top as isTop,
u.id as userId, u.nickname as nickName, u.avatar as avatar,
c.name as categoryName, tt.tagsName as tagName,
-- 热度计算 ( a.view_count * 0.2 + a.like_count * 1 + a.comment_count * 2 + a.collect_count * 3 ) * EXP( - GREATEST( TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, a.published_at, NOW()), 0 ) / 48 ) AS hotScore
from article a
left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id
left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id
where a.visibility = 0 and a.status = 1 and a.published_at is not null and a.published_at < NOW() -- 防未来数据 and a.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY)
order by hotScore desc, a.published_at desc
limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverImage, a.type,a.published_at as updatedTime, a.view_count as viewCount, a.like_count as likeCount, a.comment_count as commentCount, a.collect_count as collectCount, a.share_count as shareCount, a.is_recommend as isRecommend, a.is_top as isTop,
u.id as userId,u.nickname as nickName,u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName, tt.tagsName as tagName,
( a.view_count + a.like_count * 10 + a.comment_count * 5 + a.collect_count * 3 ) as score
from article a left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join ( select atr.article_id, GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ',') AS tagsName from article_tag at join article_tag_relation atr on at.id = atr.tag_id group by atr.article_id ) tt on tt.article_id = a.id
where a.visibility = 0 and a.status = 1 and a.published_at is not null and a.is_recommend = 1
order by a.is_top desc, score desc, a.published_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
select a.category_id as categoryId, atr.tag_id as tagId, a.user_id as authorId from article a left join article_tag_relation atr on a.id = atr.article_id where a.id = #{articleId} limit 1

select a.id -- (a.view_count * 1 -- + a.like_count * 10 -- + a.comment_count * 6 -- + a.collect_count * 8 -- + a.share_count * 4) AS finalScore
from article a
left join article_tag_relation atr on a.id = atr.article_id
left join user u on a.user_id = u.id left join category c on a.category_id = c.id
where a.visibility = 0 and a.status = 1 and a.published_at is not null and a.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY)
and a.id not in
#{id}
and a.view_count < 1000
and a.view_count >= 1000
group by a.id
order by a.published_at desc
limit #{pageSize}

select count(*) as total, sum(status = '1') as published, sum(status = '2') as pending, sum(created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval weekday(curdate()) day)) as weeklyNew from article where status != '4';
